name: Barbell Seated Behind-The-Neck Press
shortDescription: A shoulder press variation performed seated with a barbell lowered behind the neck to target the deltoids.
instructions: Sit on a bench with back support and grip the barbell with hands wider than shoulder-width. Lower the barbell slowly behind your head to just below ear level, then press upward until arms are fully extended. Use a spotter and maintain upright posture.
steps: Sit on a bench with back support; grip barbell wider than shoulders.
Unrack barbell and hold above your head.
Lower barbell behind your head to just below ear level.
Press barbell back up to the starting position.
Repeat for desired reps, keeping core engaged.
breathing: Exhale when pressing up, inhale when lowering the bar.
